overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a Divination classroom from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring gothic stone architecture, purple velvet drapery, and students seated at round tables with crystal balls. Warm natural light streams through tall arched windows as characters move through the space, creating a magical academic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic divination classroom with crystal ball tables

agents.ego_description: Stationary observation of the classroom from a fixed vantage point, watching students and passing characters

notable_agents.action: character in yellow robes and turban enters from left foreground, walks across the room, and exits left
character in dark robes enters from right side and walks toward the center tables

entered.detail: Large wall tapestry depicting a wizard with a crystal ball against a starry background
Tall arched window with stone tracery allowing natural light to enter
Heavy purple drapes flanking the central window
Round wooden table with a glowing crystal ball on top
Gothic stone archway and wall with medieval masonry
Circular patterned rug covering the stone floor
Dark wooden storage cabinet against the back wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic Divination classroom with stone walls and purple drapery. Students in dark robes sit at round tables studying crystal balls while natural light streams through tall arched windows. A character in yellow robes walks through the foreground from left to right, and another character enters from the right side, creating a sense of activity in the magical classroom setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic Divination classroom that maintains a steady, atmospheric focus on the magical academic activity within. It begins with a wide perspective of the stone walls and purple velvet drapery, where students in dark robes are gathered around round tables studying crystal balls. As natural light streams through the tall arched windows, the stillness of the room is broken by a character in yellow robes walking through the foreground from left to right. The scene then shifts in dynamic energy as another character enters from the right side, completing the sense of movement and life within the scholarly space.
